1728670.name: Roads of Destiny
1728670.description:
This is a story about the sorceress Imerel, who did not find her place among the magicians, and a magical stray dog named Gops, who must perform a great feat in order to return to his distant land. Such different heroes should not have met, but the Roads of Destiny have long woven their paths together.
A terrible curse has spread to the whole world, fiends of darkness are getting closer to the settlements, and seers see two true friends on the Roads of Destiny, who are destined to save the world from ancient mysterious forces...
1728670.supported_languages:
俄语*, 英语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
